Name: FEditableTextBoxStyle
Description: Represents the appearance of an SEditableTextBox

Variables.Name: BackgroundImageNormal
Variables.Description: Border background image when the box is not hovered or focused

Variables.Name: BackgroundImageHovered
Variables.Description: Border background image when the box is hovered

Variables.Name: BackgroundImageFocused
Variables.Description: Border background image when the box is focused

Variables.Name: BackgroundImageReadOnly
Variables.Description: Border background image when the box is read-only

Variables.Name: Font
Variables.Description: Font family and size to be used when displaying this text.

Variables.Name: BackgroundColor
Variables.Description: The background color applied to the active background image

Variables.Name: ReadOnlyForegroundColor
Variables.Description: The read-only foreground color of text in read-only mode.
